title: Tierra Garden GPW0653 Jumbo Foam Kneeling Mat, 39" x 15.25"
features: Protect your knees around the home and garden this ultimate kneeling mat
39 Inch in length - allows you to work more efficiently in the garden without the need to continuously get up and move the mat
Triple layer foam construction provides comfort and durability
Also works great as a maintenance mat in the garage or when painting
description: Protect your knees around the home and garden with this extra large kneeling mat. Soft foam helps protect from sharp objects. Hang up handle for easy storage. Triple layer foam construction. Lightweight and easy to carry, it's also works great to use as a seat cushion at sporting events, picnics and outdoor concerts. 16 x 16 Inch.
